name: nicholas1513-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Nicholas DeTore.

plugins.name: rag
plugins.description: Two-layer RAG memory system for investigation work — System Knowledge (durable, versioned) and Issue Memory (active cards). Bundles /rag:init, /rag:card, /rag:trace, /rag:promote, /rag:context, and the /rag:memory orchestrator.

plugins.name: decision-engine
plugins.description: Personal goal-indexed decision engine. Treats goals as first-class indexed objects, evaluates new inputs against them via reusable workflows (e.g., house_analyzer), and persists runs for longitudinal analysis. Ships a session-start agent (@decision-engineer), a reactive skill, and an MCP server for state management.
